prompt: A cinematic third-person in-game screenshot from a realistic ancient Chinese open-world RPG set at night in a luxurious pleasure district. The camera is positioned behind a tall male protagonist with long black hair tied half-up, wearing a dark embroidered hanfu-style robe, standing in the middle of a wet stone street and facing the entrance of an ornate brothel pavilion. The central building is richly detailed with carved wooden columns, glowing red lanterns, gold calligraphy plaques, and warm amber interior lighting spilling onto the street. A large horizontal signboard above the entrance reads “春院”. On the two front columns are vertical calligraphy couplets. Around the doorway and street are exactly 16 visible NPCs: 1 player character in the foreground seen from behind, 7 courtesans in flowing translucent silk hanfu dresses posed near the entrance and seated on stools, 6 pedestrians and guests scattered on the right side street and bridge area, and 2 seated figures inside the entrance area. The women wear elegant Tang/Song-inspired gowns in pale peach, pink, ivory, mint, and light gold, with exposed shoulders, layered gauze, elaborate updos, and hair ornaments; the men wear darker long robes. The ground is glossy from recent rain, reflecting lantern light. In the background on the right is a canal-town night scene with a stone bridge, multi-story traditional buildings, more lanterns, and dense atmospheric depth. The image should feel like a high-budget game demo, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, dramatic, moody, and sensual but not explicit. Overlay a full Chinese MMORPG HUD interface: top left circular player portrait with level 35, red and blue health and mana bars, small status icons; left side quest tracker with exactly 4 quest lines in Chinese; bottom left chat box with multiple Chinese messages and channel tabs; top right a circular minimap with the location text “清河县·怡春院 (1123, 885)” and exactly 8 small menu icons around it; bottom center a thin experience bar; bottom right an action bar with exactly 8 circular skill buttons, including green martial-arts skills, golden highlighted abilities, and a larger movement/jump button. Use ultra-realistic cinematic MMORPG UI, ancient Chinese red-light district at night, 春院, dark charcoal black, and warm lantern glow with cool night shadows.
